scripts.dev: npm run build -w @pi-gui/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @pi-gui/server" "npm run dev -w @pi-gui/web"
scripts.dev:watch: npm run build -w @pi-gui/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:watch -w @pi-gui/server" "npm run dev -w @pi-gui/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pi-gui/shared && npm run build -w @pi-gui/server && npm run build -w @pi-gui/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @pi-gui/shared && npm run typecheck -ws
scripts.test: npm run test -w @pi-gui/server && npm run test -w @pi-gui/web
